item.title: Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd Surges 7.22% to Day's High of Rs 109 — Outperforms Sector by 5.61 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 1.35% on 13 Apr 2026, while Exicom Tele-Systems Ltd surged 7.22%, outperforming its sector by 5.61 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market, raising the question of whether this rally signals a sustained recovery or a technical bounce within a mixed trend. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Inox India Ltd Surges 7.94% to Day's High of Rs 1403.95 — Outperforms Sector by 7.65 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.35% on 13 Apr 2026, while Inox India Ltd surged 7.94%, outperforming its sector by 7.65 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market backdrop. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: India Tourism Development Corporation Ltd Surges 7.08% to Day's High of Rs 663.9 — Outperforms Sector by 7.71 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined 1.35% on 13 Apr 2026, yet India Tourism Development Corporation Ltd surged 7.08%, outperforming its Hotels & Resorts sector by 7.71 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid broader market weakness, signalling a strong momentum play rather than a market-driven lift. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Micro-Cap Jinkushal Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit — Rs 3.6 Crore Turnover and Delivery Trends Under the Lens
item.description: At Rs 65.83, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Jinkushal Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 20% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Quest Laboratories Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 110.25, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Quest Laboratories Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Cyber Media Research & Services Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 63.0, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Cyber Media Research & Services Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 13,200 Puts — Just Above Current Price — Draw 2,643 Contracts on Maruti Suzuki India Ltd
item.description: The stock is trading marginally below the Rs 13,200 strike, with 2,643 put contracts changing hands on 13 Apr 2026. This activity, close to the money and ahead of the 28 Apr expiry, suggests a nuanced picture of positioning in Maruti Suzuki India Ltd rather than a straightforward bearish bet. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 10% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 679.7, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Gujarat Alkalies & Chemicals Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 9.99% on 13 Jun 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 232.95, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Likhitha Infrastructure Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 2,000 Puts — 6.1% Below Current Price — Draw 3,076 Contracts on Adani Enterprises Ltd
item.description: Rs 2,000 put options on Adani Enterprises Ltd attracted 3,076 contracts on 13 Apr 2026, representing significant activity at a strike price 6.1% below the current underlying price of Rs 2,129.60. This surge in put volume comes amid a recent rally in the stock, raising questions about whether this reflects hedging, bearish positioning, or put writing strategies. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 410 Calls on Tata Power Company Ltd See Heavy Activity — What the Strike Price Tells You
item.description: On 13 Apr 2026, 8,436 call contracts at the Rs 410 strike traded on Tata Power Company Ltd, with the stock closing at Rs 408.90, just shy of the strike price. This near at-the-money activity coincided with a 2.30% gain in the cash market, signalling a synchronised directional interest between the options and equity segments. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Impex Ferro Tech Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 5% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 1.44, Impex Ferro Tech Ltd locked at its lower circuit limit of 5% on 13 Apr 2026, with sellers lined up but no buyers willing to absorb the supply. This freeze at the floor price highlights unfilled sell orders and a market unable to find demand at these levels. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: 5,523 Call Contracts at Rs 2,200 Strike on Adani Enterprises Ltd Signal Near-Term Upside Interest
item.description: On 13 Apr 2026, Adani Enterprises Ltd witnessed significant call option activity with 5,523 contracts traded at the Rs 2,200 strike price, while the stock closed at Rs 2,129.60. This surge in call buying coincided with a 1.86% gain in the cash market, suggesting a synchronised directional interest between the derivatives and underlying equity. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Eastern Silk Industries Ltd Locks at Lower Circuit With 4.99% Loss — Sellers Queue, No Buyers in Sight
item.description: At Rs 60.23, sellers were still queuing — but there were no buyers willing to take the other side. Eastern Silk Industries Ltd locked at its lower circuit of 4.99% on 13 Apr 2026, with unfilled sell orders and a frozen price. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Rs 970 Puts — Just Below Current Price — Draw 2,586 Contracts on Hindalco Industries Ltd
item.description: The stock is trading at Rs 971.50, just above the Rs 970 put strike where 2,586 contracts changed hands on 13 Apr 2026. This near-the-money put activity on Hindalco Industries Ltd suggests a nuanced picture that blends hedging with cautious positioning rather than outright bearishness. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Setco Automotive Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 3.7% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 24.15, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Setco Automotive Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 13 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slides Over 1,000 Points as Market Breadth Weakens; Utilities Shine Amid Broad Sector Declines
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a broad-based sell-off on 13 Apr 2026, with the Sensex plunging 1,047.25 points, or 1.35%, to close at 76,503.00. Market breadth weakened considerably as only 151 stocks advanced against 345 decliners across the BSE500, reflecting widespread investor caution amid sectoral pressures and subdued global cues. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a notable downturn, declining by 1.21% on 13 Apr 2026. Despite the broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks displayed resilience, with Adani Power leading gains while others, such as Cholaman Investment & Finance, lagged significantly. The market breadth remained subdued, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment ahead of key corporate earnings announcements. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Decline Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends on 13 Apr 2026
item.description: The BSE Smallcap 250 index experienced a modest decline of 0.22% on 13 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood within the small-cap segment. Despite this overall dip, individual stock performances varied significantly, with some names delivering robust gains while others faced steep losses. Market breadth indicators further underscored the segment's uneven momentum, as declining stocks outnumbered advancing ones by nearly two to one. Time: 5 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Modest Decline Amid Mixed Sectoral Performance
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index experienced a modest decline of 0.66% on 13 Apr 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood in the mid-cap segment. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks delivered notable gains, while sectoral breadth remained skewed towards decliners, signalling a mixed performance across the board. Time: 5 minutes ago
